scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html services.html about.html results.html contact.html styles.css dist/ && cp bond-cleaning-quote-calculator.html bondQuoteEngine.js google3e4e297ea1482367.html dist/ && cp public/_redirects dist/ && rm -rf dist/images && cp -R images dist/
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=motionmade --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
